[[Ducha]] '''AlGray''' was the head of [[House AlGray]] and the leader of the [[Heritage Council]], which sought to assassinate the [[Queen Mother]], [[Tenel Ka Djo|Tenel Ka]]. She was suspected of being involved in the plot to assassinate the Queen Mother and her young daughter, [[Allana Djo Solo|Allana]]. This proved true when AlGray and her army attacked Tenel Ka and her Hapan forces, which escalated into the [[Battle of Hapes (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Hapes]]. Shortly after the conclusion of the battle, AlGray and several members of the Heritage Council were detained and questioned.

At some point she named [[Aleson Gray]] her [[Duch'da]].
